patch.value: Add an opt-in --upsert flag to 'pm todos import' that updates existing pm items instead of creating duplicates on re-import. Matches each incoming markdown checkbox to an existing item by (1) the embedded <!-- pm-id --> provenance comment the exporter emits, then (2) a stable title signature for hand-written files. Also parses the <!-- pm-id --> comment out of the title on every import so export->edit->import-with-upsert round-trips land edits on the same items. Default (no flag) behavior is unchanged: items are always created.

Default import still duplicates on re-run; --upsert keeps the item count stable and updates in place; export->import --upsert preserves ids and creates no duplicates; status not re-sent when unchanged; non-recursive bounded spawning; unit tests + functional test pass; changelog:check exits 0.
